leadText: Porto Marinada (Japanese: マリナードタウン Marinade Town) is a town in the Paldea region, located in West Province (Area Two).

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] The Glow Stick Dance emote is the only emote that features variants as well as the only emote that plays indefinitely. The Glow Stick Dance emote is based on the Japanese dance Wotagei. The southwest shore of Porto Marinada features a blockade of Wave-dissipating concrete blocks , a type of concrete structure designed to minimize wave damage against shores and shoreline structures. Origin [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Pokémon world in relation to the real world → Paldea Porto Marinada may be based on the Portuguese town of Costa Nova do Prado with its iconic striped houses. The Porto Marinada Market's exterior also resembles Costa Nova's market facade and old coloring.
